RICEFW Description/ Short Text: Enhancement - Custom Fields in Manage bank Accounts
Comments:
Received SAP Comments.
On Hold - Requires SAP Comments..

Intel’s bank accounts will be maintained in Manage bank accounts app in S/4 HANA. Treasury requires the addition of below custom fields in the Manage bank account app to support the below requirements –
Management region - This field  refers to the Cash Management team who owns the account 
2) Operating site - This field refers to the Operational team who owns the account based on bank branch 
3) M&A - Checkbox to indicate if this account belongs to an M&A activity
4) Intermediary SWIFT –  This fields lists the SWIFT code of the Intermediary bank
5) Intermediary Bank -  This field lists the name of the Intermediary bank

TM:RICEFW1: OTC IP​
 1. Build two custom fields- “Back-Dated Order” flag & “Ship-Ahead Window“ fields in the Freight Unit document for Ops reporting and future TM functionality.​​
 2. Populate the two custom fields: Copy Ship-Ahead values from Sales Order into Freight Unit document to include the value (in days), enabling TM to account for additional transportation days while planning. ​​

 4. Identify TM eligible deliveries: Additional attribute "Material type" in addition to standard filters Shipping point, Delivery type & Shipping conditions filter​

1. FTS IP- DG indicator from the delivery header text to be transmitted to the existing DG field in Freight Unit
